description_long: This lamppost features a tall, dark brown central pole with a flared, faceted base for stability. At the top, four lantern-style lamp heads are arranged symmetrically, each with a polygonal, slightly tapered shape and warm amber panels, capped with dark brown tops. The lamp heads are connected to the central pole by gently curving arms, creating a balanced and classic appearance. The design evokes a vintage or Victorian aesthetic, suitable for urban parks, boulevards, or historic districts. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and arms, with glass or acrylic panels in the lamp heads. No visible signage, banners, or additional attachments are present, and the structure is clearly intended to be fixed in place.
description: A vintage-style lamppost with four amber-paneled lantern heads on a dark brown metal pole, featuring a flared base and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of four lantern heads and the flared base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the side profile of the lamp heads and the curvature of the supporting arms.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with a clear look at the lamp head arrangement and base.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the back sides of the lantern heads and the central pole's structure.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Polygonal lantern-style heads with amber panels and dark brown caps, evoking a Victorian or classic streetlamp aesthetic.
